name_local: 円山公園・北海道神宮

phrases.intent_en: Where do I write an ema plaque?
phrases.text_local: えまは どこで かけますか？
phrases.cultural_note: You buy the ema first, then write your wish at a nearby stand before hanging it on the designated rack.

likely_response.local: うらのかきばに つくえが あります。
likely_response.translation_en: There are tables at the writing area around back.

responses.english: There are tables at the writing area around back.
responses.local: うらのかきばに つくえが あります。

phrases.intent_en: Where do I buy omamori charms?
phrases.text_local: おまもりは どこで かえますか？
phrases.cultural_note: Omamori are typically sold by Miko at a dedicated window or office (社務所/shamusho) near the main hall.

likely_response.local: しゃでんの となり、ひだりです。
likely_response.translation_en: Next to the shrine building, on the left.

responses.english: Next to the shrine building, on the left.
responses.local: しゃでんの となり、ひだりです。
